stonetop.summary: A southern scholar who hunts the World's End for relics to study and sell.

system.concept: A southern scholar who hunts the World's End for relics to study and sell.
system.description: Among the southern well-to-do, the glorious past is a point of pride. Wealthy households keep pet scholars on retainer and sponsor the study of ruins and antiquities. The best southern sites are long since dug up — but up north, at the World's End, one can barely swing a shovel without hitting some relic of the past, just waiting to be excavated. And studied. And sold.
